zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Farley於1592年1月15日在英國英格蘭爾奧德萊姆受洗時，她的父親Richard John Deane de Farley32歲，母親Elizabetha Aldriche24歲。她於1610年與Captain Robert Hutchins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1657年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Farley于1592年1月15日在英国英格兰爾奧德萊姆受洗时，她的父亲Richard John Deane de Farley32岁，母亲Elizabetha Aldriche24岁。她于1610年与Captain Robert Hutchins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1657年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Farley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Farley, of which there are examples in Berkshire, Derbyshire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Gloucestershire, Staffordshire, Surrey, Wiltshire, Shropshire, and Sussex. From Old English fearn ‘fern’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. See also Farleigh , Fairley , Fairlie .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fearghaile (see Farrelly ).

variants.name: Farleigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Farleigh, of which there are examples in Hampshire, Devon, Kent, Somerset, Surrey, and Wiltshire. From Old English fearn ‘fern’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. See also Farley , Fairley , Fairlie .

variants.name: Farlow
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Shropshire, so named from Old English fearn ‘fern’ + hlāw ‘hill, tumulus’. This surname may have become confused with Farley .

variants.name: Fearnley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from any of various places called with Old English fearn ‘fern, bracken’ + lēah ‘wood, clearing’, notably the Yorkshire places Farnley near Otley, Farnley near Armley, Farnley Tyas, Fearnley in Wyke, Fernley Hill in Altofts, and perhaps also Fernilee in Derbyshire.

variants.name: Farlee
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Farley  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Farley was christened on 15 January 1592, in Audlem, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard John Deane de Farley, was 32 and her mother, Elizabetha Aldriche, was 24. She married Captain Robert Hutchins in 1610, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 February 1657, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Farley a été baptisée le 15 janvier 1592, à Audlem, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard John Deane de Farley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabetha Aldriche, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Captain Robert Hutchins en 1610, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1657, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Farley am 15. Januar 1592 in Audlem, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Richard John Deane de Farley 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabetha Aldriche 24. Sie hat 1610 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America Captain Robert Hutchins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Februar 1657 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Farley(이)가 1592년 1월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 오들렘에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard John Deane de Farley(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabetha Aldriche(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1610년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Captain Robert Hutchins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1657년 2월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Captain Robert Hutchins em 1610, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Farley была крещена 15 января 1592 г. в местности аудлем, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard John Deane de Farley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabetha Aldriche, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Captain Robert Hutchins в 1610 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 февраля 1657 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет.
